key_components: ZoneSerializer variants (Minimal, List, Detail, Create, Update)
TableSerializer variants (Minimal, List, Detail, Create, Update)
QRCodeSerializer variants (Minimal, List, Detail, Create, Update)
OrderSerializer variants (Minimal, List, Detail, Create, Update)
OrderItemSerializer variants (Minimal, List, Detail, Create, Update)
ServiceRequestSerializer variants (Minimal, List, Detail, Create, Update)
file_insights.patterns: Multi-variant serializer pattern with Minimal, List, Detail, Create, Update for each model

file_insights.purpose: URL routing for orders module viewsets
key_components: API endpoints for zones, tables, qr-codes, orders, order-items, service-requests

file_insights.purpose: ViewSets implementing CRUD operations for orders module
key_components: ZoneViewSet with list, create, retrieve, update, destroy
TableViewSet with list, create, retrieve, update, destroy
QRCodeViewSet with list, create, retrieve, update, destroy
OrderViewSet with list, create, retrieve, update, destroy

patterns_discovered.name: Multi-Variant Serializer Pattern
patterns_discovered.description: Each model has 5 serializer variants: Minimal (nested), List, Detail, Create, Update
patterns_discovered.benefit: Provides appropriate field granularity for different API endpoints
patterns_discovered.implementation: Separate classes inheriting from TenantModelSerializer with tailored Meta.fields

patterns_discovered.name: Tenant-Scoped Serializers
patterns_discovered.description: All serializers inherit from TenantModelSerializer which auto-injects organization context
patterns_discovered.benefit: Enforces multi-tenancy and prevents cross-tenant data access
patterns_discovered.implementation: Base class from shared.serializers.base handles organization injection from request

patterns_discovered.name: Computed/Aggregated Fields
patterns_discovered.description: Use SerializerMethodField for calculated values like table_count, available_table_count, occupied_table_count
patterns_discovered.benefit: Provides real-time aggregated data without separate queries
patterns_discovered.implementation: Methods like get_table_count(), get_available_table_count() with .filter() queries

patterns_discovered.name: Soft Delete Awareness
patterns_discovered.description: All queries filter with deleted_at__isnull=True to exclude soft-deleted records
patterns_discovered.benefit: Maintains data integrity while supporting soft deletes
patterns_discovered.implementation: Consistent filter pattern across all serializer methods

patterns_discovered.name: Validation at Serializer Level
patterns_discovered.description: Custom validate_* methods for slug uniqueness, cross-tenant references, and resource existence
patterns_discovered.benefit: Prevents invalid data at API boundary before reaching database
patterns_discovered.implementation: Methods like validate_slug(), validate_zone_id() with organization context checks

patterns_discovered.name: Read-Only Organization Field
patterns_discovered.description: organization_id field is auto-set and never user-writable
patterns_discovered.benefit: Prevents users from accidentally or maliciously assigning orders to wrong organizations

gotchas_discovered.issue: Zone validation in TableCreateSerializer returns Zone object, not UUID
gotchas_discovered.description: validate_zone_id returns zone object but field expects UUID; could cause type mismatch
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Return value.id instead of zone object, or adjust create() method to handle both cases

gotchas_discovered.issue: Nested zone_id field handling in table serializers
gotchas_discovered.description: TableDetailSerializer has both 'zone' (read-only) and 'zone_id' (write-only), could confuse API consumers
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Document clearly in docstring or consider using source_field for automatic mapping

gotchas_discovered.description: Methods like get_active_orders() perform database queries; could cause N+1 query problems if used in list views
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Consider using prefetch_related in viewsets or limit to detail views only

gotchas_discovered.description: active_statuses list in get_active_orders() duplicates order status constants
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Extract to OrderStatus constant or utility function to maintain DRY principle

gotchas_discovered.description: No apparent validation preventing cycles in order/item relationships or zone/table hierarchies
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Add explicit validation if circular references are possible

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully created comprehensive orders module API layer with serializers, viewsets, and URL routing
approach_outcome.completeness: Complete for specified scope (zones, tables, QR codes, orders, items, service requests)
key_achievements: Multi-variant serializer architecture supporting different API use cases
Proper tenant-scoping with organization context injection
Soft delete awareness throughout all serializers
Validation at API boundary with helpful error messages
Aggregated field computation for analytics (table counts, etc.)
Readonly fields properly protected from user modification
Proper use of help_text for API documentation
approach_outcome.code_quality: Professional-grade with comprehensive docstrings and type hints

recommendations.title: Fix zone_id validation return type
recommendations.description: validate_zone_id methods return Zone object instead of UUID; this will cause serialization issues
recommendations.action: Change return statement to return value.id instead of zone object, or update create() method to extract id from validated_data['zone_id']

recommendations.title: Add prefetch_related to ViewSets
recommendations.description: SerializerMethodFields with database queries will cause N+1 problems in list views
recommendations.action: In corresponding ViewSets, use queryset.prefetch_related('tables', 'qr_codes') and only call expensive methods in detail views

recommendations.title: Extract active status list to constant
recommendations.description: Hardcoded active_statuses list in get_active_orders() should be a shared constant
recommendations.action: Create ACTIVE_ORDER_STATUSES constant in OrderStatus choices or utils, import and use across serializers

recommendations.title: Clarify zone_id vs zone field usage
recommendations.description: Having both read-only 'zone' and write-only 'zone_id' could confuse API consumers
recommendations.action: Add clear examples in docstring or API documentation showing when to use zone vs zone_id

recommendations.title: Add comprehensive serializer validation tests
recommendations.description: Many validation methods exist but need test coverage for edge cases
recommendations.action: Create test cases for slug uniqueness, zone validation, cross-tenant prevention, soft delete filtering

recommendations.title: Consider caching for aggregated fields
recommendations.description: table_count and similar fields are computed on every request; could benefit from caching
recommendations.action: Evaluate using @cached_property or caching patterns if these fields are accessed frequently
